⚡ Solo Practice

Answer

⚡ Host Guide

Before the Game

  • Share the URL or QR code on screen — each team joins from their own phone or laptop.
  • Set your preferred timer using the pill buttons (or No Timer for open-ended discussion).
  • Wait until all teams appear in the scoreboard before starting.

Running a Question

  • Click any dollar amount on the board to open that question.
  • Read the question aloud. Teams type or tap their answer on their device.
  • Click Reveal Answer when time is up (or when enough teams have answered).

Scoring

  • Multiple choice — scoring is automatic. Correct teams get points instantly.
  • Open-ended — you decide who gets credit and click their team button to award points.
  • Close the modal to return to the board and pick the next question.

Tips

  • Use No Timer for calculation questions so teams have time to work.
  • Reset Game clears all scores and the board if you want to replay.

⚡ How to Practice

Getting Started

  • Click any dollar amount on the board to open a question.
  • Higher dollar values = harder questions.
  • You can set a timer using the pills at the top, or leave it off.

Answering

  • Multiple choice — tap A, B, C, or D, then click Reveal Answer.
  • Open-ended / graph questions — write your answer in the text box, then reveal.

Scoring

  • Multiple choice answers are checked automatically — you earn or lose points instantly.
  • For open-ended questions, compare your answer to the correct one and click Got it or Missed it to score yourself.
  • Your total score and progress are shown at the top.

Tips

  • Try all 30 questions — each category covers a key topic from the course.
  • Hit Reset to start over with a clean score.
